dc:title: Loaded touring bicycle beside rural roadway
dc:description: Color photograph of a quiet two-lane paved road receding into the distance through a dry rural landscape. In the left foreground, a loaded touring bicycle with rear panniers and gear strapped to the frame is parked against a metal guardrail beside a concrete retaining wall. Vegetation lines both sides of the road, with fencing and open fields to the right and low hills or mountains visible on the horizon under a pale blue sky. The scene suggests bicycle travel or a roadside pause in a warm, arid countryside.
